---
title: "Talks"
---

Seminar talks, with slides.

## Generative Models

*Seminar · 7 November 2025*

A survey of the major families of generative models — VAEs, GANs, diffusion, and flow-based methods.

[Download slides (PDF)](/files/generative-models.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}

## State-Space Models

*Seminar · 21 October 2025*

State-space models (SSMs) for sequence modeling — from the continuous-time formulation through discretisation to selective scans (Mamba).

[Download slides (PDF)](/files/state-space-models.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}

## Computer Vision: Object Recognition

*Seminar · 21 October 2025*

Object recognition in computer vision — backbones, detection, and segmentation.

[Download slides (PDF)](/files/computer-vision.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
